vocab.example: For a person with such a hectic schedule as mine, a watch is an indispensable tool for time management.
I am particularly drawn to high-end watches that showcase exquisite craftsmanship and attention to detail.
In many professional circles, a luxury timepiece serves as a subtle status symbol that reflects one's success.
Although my phone is always handy, I still prefer glancing at my wrist to keep track of time during meetings.

vocab.meaning: món đồ cơ bản/thiết yếu trong tủ đồ
vocab.example: A classic minimalist watch has become a wardrobe staple for me, as it goes well with almost any outfit.
Modern smartwatches are true technological marvels, packed with features like heart rate monitoring and GPS.
I find skeleton watches, which reveal their internal gears, to be incredibly aesthetically pleasing.

vocab.meaning: trường tồn với thời gian (bền bỉ)
vocab.example: I invest in high-quality mechanical watches because they are built to withstand the test of time for decades.

vocab.meaning: không đeo gì trên tay (nghĩa bóng: để tay trần)
vocab.example: I feel somewhat naked or 'bare-knuckled' if I leave the house without strapping on my favorite watch.

vocab.meaning: món đồ linh hoạt (dễ phối hợp)
vocab.example: This silver watch is such a versatile piece; I can wear it to a gym session or a black-tie event.
